creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jan Beich <jbeich@tormail.org> writes:

> Can you reproduce outside of firefox? Try
>
>   $ fetch http://media.w3.org/2010/05/sintel/trailer.webm
>   $ gst-launch playbin2 uri=file://$PWD/trailer.webm

s/webm/mp4/ of course. firefox doesn't use gstreamer for webm/ogg.

https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=803287
